name: quirkatar
description: A free, lightweight, zero-dependency procedural avatar generator. Create unique, quirky profile pictures from any seed string.

scripts.build:cjs: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const code=fs.readFileSync('avatar.js','utf8'); fs.writeFileSync('avatar.cjs', code.replace('export { generateAvatarSvg };', 'module.exports = { generateAvatarSvg };'))"

author: Nitty-Gritty-Design
